name: 10-Band Parametric EQ (audio chain v2)
author: KB2UKA
description: 10-band parametric EQ with input + output gain stages and live FFT spectrum analyser. Per-band frequency / gain / Q, bypass with gain-still-applies semantics. Cascaded biquad peaking filters per the RBJ Audio EQ Cookbook. Live 2048-point input + output spectrum overlays under the EQ curve so the operator sees what the EQ is doing to their voice in real time. Realtime managed C#, no native dependency.
